creator: mike@FreeBSD.org
text:
Adding to Audit-Trail.

----- Forwarded message from John Galbraith <john@bartok.lanl.gov> -----

Delivered-To: mike@freebsd.org
From: John Galbraith <john@bartok.lanl.gov>
Date: Mon, 23 Jul 2001 09:36:54 -0600 (MDT)
To: <mike@FreeBSD.org>
Subject: Re: kern/18924: sysctl hw.bt848 crashes machine (bktr driver problem?)
In-Reply-To: <200107220300.f6M30lr90142@freefall.freebsd.org>
X-Mailer: VM 6.75 under 21.1 (patch 12) "Channel Islands" XEmacs Lucid

>>>>> "Mike" == mike  <mike@FreeBSD.org> writes:

    Mike> Does this problem still occur in newer versions of FreeBSD, such
    Mike> as 4.3-RELEASE?

I originally reported this problem, but I don't know if it still happens on
4.3.  I had to move by bt848 cards from my desktop FreeBSD box to another
machine running Linux because the Linux machine is part of a cluster that
we have.

John
